title: Boston Properties: A Significantly Mispriced Office REIT
text: Boston Properties is one of the largest office-focused REITs with an interest in about 200 Class A properties in six top U.S. markets. Despite the uncertain outlook for office space, they are posting record leasing volumes at extended lease terms with favorable spreads.

title: 2 Stocks I'd Actively Avoid This Week
text: These two REITs are loaded with debt, and interest rates are going up.

title: 7 Undervalued REITs to Buy in August
text: The U.S. inflation rate has surged to levels not seen since the early 1980s. This has had profound ramifications for investors.
